AI-Native GTM Transformation

Lead Your Organization's
AI Revenue
Transformation.

Your peers are rebuilding their revenue teams around AI — and reporting the results to their boards. Treetop designs the architecture and gives you the roadmap to lead it internally.

Start the Conversation Take the Gap Assessment →

No pitch deck. No intake form. 30 minutes.

The Situation

Most companies are buying AI tools.
A few are rebuilding around AI.

The difference isn't budget. It's architecture. AI-native GTM isn't about which tools you have — it's about whether your entire revenue system is designed around AI from the start.

The gap between them widens every quarter.

01
The Tool Trap

Buying Clay, Gong, and Apollo doesn't make you AI-native. Siloed tools without a connected architecture produce activity, not revenue.

02
The Strategy Gap

AI amplifies what's already working. If your ICP, messaging, or pipeline motion is broken, AI makes it fail faster and at greater scale.

03
The Window

The gap between AI-native and AI-decorated companies compounds every quarter. The window to lead this transformation is open — but it closes.

The Architecture

What Gets Built
In 90 Days

AI-native GTM isn't a new tool layer — it's a rebuilt system. Here's what a complete AI-native revenue architecture actually contains.

01
Dynamic ICP System

A living ICP model that refines itself from win/loss data, intent signals, and conversion patterns — not a static document that goes stale in 90 days.

02
AI-Augmented Outbound

Outbound rebuilt around AI enrichment, true personalization at scale, and signal-based sequencing. Your team touches accounts the system has already pre-qualified.

03
Pipeline Intelligence

Dashboards and attribution that connect every GTM activity to revenue outcomes. So you can tell your board exactly what your AI investment is producing.

04
Revenue Workflows

Automations, handoffs, and AI-powered workflows that let a leaner team produce 3–4x the qualified pipeline without adding headcount proportionally.

The Process

From First Call
to Revenue Transformation

Most engagements reach full operational velocity within 90 days.

01
Diagnose Week 1–2

We audit your current GTM motion — ICP definition, outbound performance, pipeline mechanics, AI tool ROI — and identify exactly where the transformation opportunity lives.

02
Design & Build Week 3–6

We design and implement the AI-native GTM architecture: dynamic ICP, AI-augmented outbound, pipeline intelligence, and the connected workflows that tie them together.

03
Lead Week 7–10

You own the narrative internally. We give you the frameworks, the language, and the metrics to report to your board with confidence. The transformation is yours.

04
Transfer Week 11–12

We hand off a system that runs without us. Your team owns it. We document everything. You leave with a working AI-native revenue motion and the playbook to scale it.

Who It's For

Built for Executives
Who've Heard the Story

If any of these sound familiar, we should talk.

"

A peer told me they cut their GTM team by 40% while growing pipeline. I want to understand if we can replicate that in our organization.

— CMO, $15M B2B SaaS

"

We've bought every AI tool on the market. My board is asking what the ROI is and I can't give them a clean answer.

— CRO, Series B Platform

"

I want to be the executive who led our AI transformation, not the one who's still explaining why we haven't started.

— CEO, Vertical SaaS

Not the right fit

This engagement is not for companies still finding product-market fit, or organizations looking to pilot a single AI tool. AI-native GTM transformation requires a working revenue motion to rebuild around.

Now Available

Claude for
Small Business

Anthropic's Claude is the most capable AI available for business workflows — and most small businesses are using it at 10% of its potential. We close that gap in weeks, not months.
